Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 62 

CMBND_BENE_CST_SHRNG_PD_AMT 

LABEL: Combined Beneficiary Cost Sharing Paid Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The combined amounts the beneficiary or his or her representative (e.g., their guardian) paid towards 
their copayment, coinsurance, and/or deductible for the covered services on the claim. This data 
element is reported only when the claim does not differentiate among copayment,
